supportedCapabilities.summary: Save file content or resource-file content as text in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: содержимое файла( ресурсов)? "(.*)" сохраняем в переменную сценария "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed step has two modes: resource-file content when the optional 'ресурсов' fragment is present, otherwise project-file content.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Wait for one downloaded file whose name contains the expected text, then optionally copy that file into a scenario variable before deleting the original downloaded file.
stepPatterns: файл "(.*)" загрузился в директорию загрузки( и сохранён в переменную сценария "(.*)")?
notes: The reviewed implementation polls a configured download directory for up to 5 seconds.
Matching is by filename substring and the step fails if more than one matching file is present.
When the optional save fragment is used, the stored variable is a copied File under build/downloads/<scenarioId> rather than the original download.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Wait for one downloaded file whose name contains the expected text and copy it to an explicit path.
stepPatterns: файл "(.*)" загрузился в директорию загрузки и сохранён по пути "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed implementation uses the same configured download-directory polling and substring-match semantics as the optional-save download step.
After copying, it deletes the original downloaded file.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Generate a random local file with the requested size in megabytes and extension, then save the File object in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: сохраняем рандомный файл размером "(.*)" МБ в формате "(.*)" в переменную "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed step promises random-file creation only; it does not define file-content semantics beyond helper-generated output.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read the name of a stored File variable and save that filename string in another scenario variable.
stepPatterns: сохраняем имя файла "(.*)" в переменную "(.*)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Write a byte-array scenario variable into a local file with the requested name and save that File object in another scenario variable.
stepPatterns: значение переменной "(.*)" преобразуем в файл с именем "(.*)" и сохраняем в переменную "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed implementation expects the source variable to hold byte[].
The created file is written under build/downloads/<scenarioId>/ rather than an arbitrary caller-selected directory.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Wrap a resolved local file path into a File object and save it in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: сохранить файл "(.+)" в переменную сценария "(.+)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Unpack a reviewed ZIP archive from a file variable or file path and save the extracted File list in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: распаковать архив "(.+)" и сохранить список разархивированных файлов в переменную "(.+)"
notes: The reviewed step is explicitly an unzip flow and does not claim generic archive-format support.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that a stored file list contains files whose names match the expected exact names or regex templates.
stepPatterns: список файлов "(.+)" содержит файлы с именами:?
notes: Each expected name is matched against the remaining list and a matched file is removed from further matching, so the same file cannot satisfy multiple expected rows.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Find one file in a stored file list by exact name or regex-like pattern and save that File object in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из списка файлов "(.+)" сохранить файл с именем "(.+)" в переменную "(.+)"
notes: The reviewed implementation resolves a processed name template for messaging but matches using the raw fileName argument in the stream predicate.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Load a DOCX template from reviewed resources, replace placeholder text from a table, save the resulting DOCX file locally, and store that File object in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: в DOCX-шаблон "(.+)" подставить переменные из таблицы, сохранив результат в файл "(.+)"
notes: The reviewed step loads the template through resource-file lookup rather than generic local-file lookup.
Placeholder replacement is text-based over collected DOCX text nodes; it does not promise full Word template-engine semantics.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that two stored DOCX File variables have equal extracted text content.
stepPatterns: содержимое DOCX-файлов "(.*)" и "(.*)" равно
notes: The reviewed equality check compares extracted main-document text content, not binary DOCX equivalence, style/layout equality, or metadata equality.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Extract text content from a reviewed DOCX input and save that text in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: содержимое DOCX-файла "(.*)" сохранено в переменную "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed implementation uses resource-file lookup after processValue, so callers should not assume arbitrary DOCX source handling beyond that behavior.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that a reviewed Excel file contains a sheet with the requested name.
stepPatterns: в excel-файле "(.*)" есть страница "(.*)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read reviewed Excel cells by sheet and address definitions from a table and save their values into scenario variables.
stepPatterns: из excel-файла "(.*)" значения ячеек сохранены в переменные:?
notes: The reviewed implementation stores actualValue.toString() for each extracted cell rather than preserving typed workbook objects.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Find one Excel row on a reviewed sheet by table-provided cell conditions and save the Row object in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из excel-файла "(.*)" со страницы "(.*)" строка с параметрами из таблицы сохранена в переменную "(.*)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read values from a stored Excel Row object and save selected columns into scenario variables.
stepPatterns: из excel-строки "(.*)" значения столбцов сохранены в переменные:?

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert reviewed typed conditions against specific Excel cells selected by sheet and cell address.
stepPatterns: для excel-файла "(.*)" выполняются условия из таблицы:?

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert reviewed typed conditions across every cell inside an Excel range.
stepPatterns: для диапазона excel-файла "(.*)" выполняются условия из таблицы:?

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert reviewed typed conditions against selected columns of a stored Excel Row object.
stepPatterns: для excel-строки "(.*)" выполняются условия из таблицы:?

supportedCapabilities.summary: Convert a reviewed Excel file into JSON text and save that JSON string in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: содержимое excel-файла "(.*)" сохраняем в виде json в переменную "(.*)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Convert one reviewed Excel range into JSON text and save that JSON string in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: часть содержимого excel-файла "(.*)" сохраняем в виде json в переменную "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed scope is a caller-provided range only; it does not promise arbitrary workbook slicing semantics beyond the helper-backed part-to-JSON conversion.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert the fill color of one reviewed Excel cell on a specific sheet using an RGB string.
stepPatterns: в excel-файле "(.*)" на странице "(.*)" ячейка "(.*)" имеет цвет заливки "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed implementation contains a dedicated special case for white fill (255;255;255).
The step operates through XSSF color handling and does not promise broader style/theme inspection.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Parse an HTML string, select one element by XPath, and save that element object in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из HTML-строки "(.+)" получить элемент по xpath "(.+)" и сохранить в переменную "(.+)"
notes: The reviewed step operates on an HTML string only and does not claim browser-page lookup or CSS selector semantics.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read the own-text content of a stored HTML element and save it in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из HTML-элемента "(.+)" сохранить внутренний текст в переменную "(.+)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read one attribute value from a stored HTML element and save it in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из HTML-элемента "(.+)" сохранить значение атрибута "(.+)" в переменную "(.+)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Compare two stored BufferedImage variables and fail when the reviewed diff algorithm finds a difference.
stepPatterns: сравнить изображение "(.*)" с "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed implementation ignores magenta during diffing and emits attachments on failure.
This bundle does not promote configurable thresholds, masks, or OCR semantics beyond that exact step.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Load an image from a path and save the BufferedImage in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: получить изображение по пути "(.*)" и сохранить в переменную "(.*)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that JsonPath-selected values from a JSON string or JSON file match the expected table values.
stepPatterns: в json (строке|файле) "(.*)" значения, найденные по JsonPath, равны значениям из таблицы
notes: The reviewed implementation uses a configuration that always returns lists and then compares only the first matched value for each JsonPath.
Expected values support exact string equality and the reviewed 'not_null' sentinel.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Extract JsonPath-selected values from a JSON string or JSON file and save them as stringified values in scenario variables.
stepPatterns: значения из json (строки|файла) "(.*)", найденные по JsonPath из таблицы, сохранены в переменные
notes: The reviewed implementation selects only the first value from the returned JsonPath list for each row and stringifies that value before storage.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Resolve a JSON string or reviewed JSON file content, escape it as a JSON string literal, and save the result in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: сохраняем json "(.*)" в виде строки в переменную "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed step performs JSON-string escaping, not generic JSON normalization or pretty printing.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read values from a stored REST response body by JsonPath or GPath and save them as JSON strings in scenario variables.
stepPatterns: из ответа "(.*)" значения тела, найденные по (jsonpath|GPath)?, сохранены в переменные
notes: The reviewed step assumes the source variable holds a RestAssured Response object.
The path mode is limited to the reviewed JsonPath versus GPath branch in the implementation.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert values from a stored REST response body by JsonPath or GPath against expected table values.
stepPatterns: из ответа "(.*)" значения тела, найденные по (jsonpath|GPath)?, равны значениям из таблицы
notes: The reviewed implementation supports exact equality and the reviewed 'not_null' sentinel rather than a broader assertion DSL.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Compare two scenario variables as JSON with array order preserved.
stepPatterns: json переменные "(.*)" и "(.*)" совпадают с учётом сортировки

supportedCapabilities.summary: Compare two scenario variables as JSON while ignoring array order.
stepPatterns: json переменные "(.*)" и "(.*)" совпадают без учёта сортировки

supportedCapabilities.summary: Compare two scenario variables as JSON with array order preserved while ignoring the specified paths.
stepPatterns: json переменные "(.*)" и "(.*)" совпадают с учётом сортировки, игнорируемые элементы:

supportedCapabilities.summary: Compare two scenario variables as JSON while ignoring both array order and the specified ignored paths.
stepPatterns: json переменные "(.*)" и "(.*)" совпадают без учёта сортировки, игнорируемые элементы:

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert reviewed typed conditions against values selected from a JSON variable by JsonPath or GPath-style paths.
stepPatterns: для json переменной "(.*)" выполняются условия из таблицы:?

supportedCapabilities.summary: Extract JsonPath-selected arrays from a JSON string or file and save the raw list results in scenario variables.
stepPatterns: значения из json (строки|файла) "(.*)", найденные по JsonPath из таблицы, сохранены в виде массива в переменные
notes: The reviewed implementation stores the returned list directly and does not enforce a typed array contract beyond that raw result.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Apply reviewed delete, set, or add/put actions to a JSON string or JSON file by JsonPath and save the transformed JSON string in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: в json (строке|файле) "(.*)" выполнено преобразование и результат сохранён в переменную "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed action surface is limited to 'удалить', 'вставить', and 'новое'.
The helper-supported value types are limited to the reviewed String/default, Integer, Long, Double, Boolean, Map, Array, and Null forms.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that each listed JsonPath does not resolve inside a stored REST response body.
stepPatterns: из ответа "(.*)" ключ по jsonpath не найден

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that a PDF file or stored PDF File variable contains or does not contain reviewed text content, either with normalized whitespace or with preserved line breaks.
stepPatterns: в PDF файле "(.+)" (содержится|отсутствует) (текст|текст с переносом строк) "(.+)"
notes: For the 'текст' variant, the reviewed implementation replaces tabs/newlines with spaces and collapses repeated whitespace before matching.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Convert a PDF file or stored PDF File variable into a BufferedImage and save that image in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: преобразовать PDF файл "(.+)" в изображение и сохранить в переменную "(.+)"
notes: The reviewed step promises only the helper-backed PDF-to-image conversion result, not page-by-page rendering controls or format tuning.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that at least one extracted PDF text line contains or does not contain the requested text fragment.
stepPatterns: в PDF файле "(.+)" (содержится|отсутствует) текст без переноса строк "(.+)"
notes: The reviewed implementation splits extracted PDF text on CRLF and checks line fragments, not broader semantic lines or layout blocks.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that a PDF contains or does not contain text slices that match the reviewed text/font/style parameter table.
stepPatterns: в PDF файле "(.+)" (содержится|отсутствует) текст c параметрами
notes: The reviewed parameter surface is limited to the step table model consumed by PDFTextParameter checks.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that a PDF table found after the specified text equals the expected table, with optional reviewed blue-design handling.
stepPatterns: в PDF файле "(.+)" таблица, найденная после текста "(.+)", равна:?
в PDF файле "(.+)" (с синим дизайном) таблица, найденная после текста "(.+)", равна:?
notes: The reviewed design selector is limited to the annotated default versus 'с синим дизайном' variants.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that a PDF table found after the specified text contains the expected rows, with optional reviewed blue-design handling.
stepPatterns: в PDF файле "(.+)" таблица, найденная после текста "(.+)", содержит строки:?
в PDF файле "(.+)" (с синим дизайном) таблица, найденная после текста "(.+)", содержит строки:?

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that the first, last, or Nth PDF table equals the expected table, with optional reviewed blue-design handling.
stepPatterns: в PDF файле "(.+)" (?:(первая|последняя) таблица|таблица с порядковым номером (\d+)) равна:?
в PDF файле "(.+)" (с синим дизайном) (?:(первая|последняя) таблица|таблица с порядковым номером (\d+)) равна:?
notes: The reviewed first/last/numeric selector maps internally to index 0, null-for-last, or one-based table number minus one.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that the first, last, or Nth PDF table contains the expected rows, with optional reviewed blue-design handling.
stepPatterns: в PDF файле "(.+)" (?:(первая|последняя) таблица|таблица с порядковым номером (\d+)) содержит строки:?
в PDF файле "(.+)" (с синим дизайном) (?:(первая|последняя) таблица|таблица с порядковым номером (\d+)) содержит строки:?

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that the first, last, or Nth table on a specific PDF page equals the expected table, with optional reviewed blue-design handling.
stepPatterns: в PDF файле "(.+)" (?:(первая|последняя) таблица|таблица с порядковым номером (\d+)) на странице (\d+) равна:?
в PDF файле "(.+)" (с синим дизайном) (?:(первая|последняя) таблица|таблица с порядковым номером (\d+)) на странице (\d+) равна:?

supportedCapabilities.summary: Assert that the first, last, or Nth table on a specific PDF page contains the expected rows, with optional reviewed blue-design handling.
stepPatterns: в PDF файле "(.+)" (?:(первая|последняя) таблица|таблица с порядковым номером (\d+)) на странице (\d+) содержит строки:?
в PDF файле "(.+)" (с синим дизайном) (?:(первая|последняя) таблица|таблица с порядковым номером (\d+)) на странице (\d+) содержит строки:?

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read one XML tag value by tag name from a reviewed XML file and save it in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из XML файла "(.+)" получить значение тэга "(.+)" и сохранить в переменную "(.+)"
notes: The reviewed step delegates tag lookup by name through XMLHelper and does not promise namespace-aware or multi-match selection semantics beyond that helper-backed behavior.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read one attribute value by tag name from a reviewed XML file and save it in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из XML файла "(.+)" получить значение атрибута "(.+)" тэга "(.+)" и сохранить в переменную "(.+)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read all XML nodes with the requested tag name from a reviewed XML file and save the NodeList in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из XML файла "(.+)" получить список тэгов по имени "(.+)" и сохранить в переменную "(.+)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Find one XML node by tag name plus attribute table and save that Node in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из XML файла "(.+)" получить тэг по имени "(.+)" с атрибутами из таблицы и сохранить в переменную "(.+)"
notes: The reviewed step promises one helper-selected node match, not a broader multi-node query contract.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read node.getNodeValue() from a stored XML Node and save that value in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из XML тэга "(.+)" получить значение и сохранить в переменную "(.+)"
notes: The reviewed implementation reads Node.getNodeValue() directly, so callers should not generalize this into robust element-text extraction for arbitrary stored node types.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Read one attribute value from a stored XML Node and save it in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: из XML тэга "(.+)" получить значение атрибута "(.+)" и сохранить в переменную "(.+)"

supportedCapabilities.summary: Run xmlpath against a reviewed XML string or file content and save the matched values as a string list in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: значения из xml (?:строки|файла) "(.*)", найденные по xmlpath "(.*)", сохранены в виде массива в переменную "(.*)"
notes: The reviewed implementation stores string values derived from either node first-child text or node values.

supportedCapabilities.summary: Escape a reviewed XML string and save the escaped text in a scenario variable.
stepPatterns: преобразовать XML строку "(.*)" и сохранить в переменную "(.*)"
